title: Barbed Wire Bat!
lines: You dive for the far corner flag and a cloud of mud and blood sprays into the air. You scored the try!
The zombies grope at the ground where you just were, but you are already crawling out of the pitch and into a small equipment shed.
Leaning against the wall is something beautiful: a heavy wooden baseball bat wrapped in thick, rusted barbed wire.
This is exactly what you'll need at the Zoo ahead.

options.desc: 1. Head toward the overgrown Zoo entrance
